comment: hippo48-500k: the scaling-curve datapoint. Identical config to hippo48-1m but fed only shards 0-3 (~463k usable) - the shuffled-slice property makes any shard union a uniform sample. With 100k (hippo48-100k) and 1M (hippo48-1m) at the same protocol this completes a 10k/100k/500k/1M curve that says whether the next move is a 5M mint or a bigger model.
